emails.subject: iPayit
emails.body: iPayit I logged on as you from my computer and approved those 3 invoices for you. I'll check with tech support on why you can't access it from your computer. Denise LaGesse Enron Transportation Services 1400 Smith Street (77002-7361) P.O. Box 1188 Houston, Texas 77251-1188 denise.lagesse@enron.com ph 713-853-6704 fax 713-853-5425

emails.subject: RE: iPayit
emails.body: RE: iPayit Denise, Thank you very much. I just got off the phone with someone from technical services and I think (knock on wood) that the problem is solved. Thanks again! To: Rapp, Bill

emails.subject: RE: iPayit
emails.body: That was FAST! Groovy! To: LaGesse, Denise
